experiences.title: Senior Flutter Developer @ Troylab
experiences.description: Analyzed user stories and converted them into TDD test cases. Applied Clean Architecture and modular design for maintainability. Extracted reusable components as standalone packages and refactored legacy codebases. Shipped releases across Android, iOS, Web, and Windows.

experiences.title: Mid-level Flutter Developer @ 5d-Agency
experiences.description: Led test-driven feature development following modular design guidelines. Built AR demos using Apple ARKit and Google ARCore, creating a customized ARKit Flutter plugin for 3D models. Built CI/CD pipelines using Visual App Center and GitHub Actions.

experiences.title: Flutter Developer @ Agility Solutions
experiences.description: Converted design files into responsive screens matching specifications precisely. Partnered with backend teams to define API contracts and response schemas. Published Android releases on the Google Play Store.

experiences.title: Flutter Developer @ Q8intouch
experiences.description: Selected architectural patterns based on feature requirements. Worked with backend teams to define API responses that matched feature requirements.

experiences.title: Flutter Developer @ Smart Fingers
experiences.description: Published applications on both Google Play Store and Apple App Store. Diagnosed and resolved app-store rejection issues before each release cycle. Built responsive interfaces from design files using established architectural patterns.
